scene.description: This is not River Street. A similar Bureau. The same desk layout. The same Maya. But you are speaking differently — like someone who has been here before.

fragments.label: You, Before
fragments.text: You, at the desk, saying it flat: 'I already tried this approach.'

fragments.label: Maya, Before
fragments.text: Maya, answering without hesitation: 'And it failed last time.'

fragments.label: The Same Desk
fragments.symbol: The desk layout is identical to yours. Down to the wear on the edge where your hand rests.

interpretations.label: Hold onto it — you were here before
